results.name: hate-wide
results.description: The more creatures your opponent controls, the more these cards scale up to punish them for it.

results.description: Cards that care about hats appearing in card art.

results.name: hauntwoods
results.description: The region of Duskmourn associated with green mana.

results.name: havel
results.description: A Dark Souls character and reference.

results.name: haven
results.description: Exile your permanents to return them at much later point, essentially storing them somewhere safe. Not to be confused with [flicker](/tags/card/flicker).

results.name: headshot
results.description:
Boom, headshot! 🎯 
Projectiles hitting (or going clean through) people's heads.

results.name: heart
results.description: The shape "❤️". For the more practical one, see [heart (organ)](heart-organ).

results.name: heckbent
results.description: Effects that care about having one or fewer cards in hand.

results.name: hedron
results.description: Geometric stone monoliths found throughout Zendikar

results.name: hekma

results.name: helica tree
results.description: Winding trees with helix-like trunks that are iconic to Ikoria.
